title: Bundle API
description: Bundle API allows mod authors to easily add bundles that can hold more than 1 stack of items specified by an item tag.
body:
# Bundle API

Bundle API allows mod authors to easily add bundles that can hold more than 1 stack of items specified by an item tag.

Read the [Readme](https://github.com/TheRedBrain/bundle-api/blob/1.21.1/README.md) for information about how to use this API.
